# /tdd

## Purpose
Implement the scoped issue through a red-green-refactor loop.

## When To Use
Delivery phase when tests should drive the implementation loop.

## Required Contracts
- `estimate-approval` - Estimate approval artifact exists and is valid
- `mode-selection-recorded` - Implementation mode selection (impl/tdd/custom) and reason are recorded

- `/review-cycle`
